local_only.recommended_when: The work should stay private and land locally without shared review, policy, or remote coordination.

solo_remote.recommended_when: The work needs shared Markdown publication, remote-backed task/change lineage, shared review, or remote land.

self_hosted_shared.recommended_when: The developer needs the shared control plane for team/server/web/worker workflows instead of the local-only trust layer.

development_expectations.task_worktree_rule: Code/runtime changes belong in a task-bound worktree; authored Markdown lineage is synced from repo root.
development_expectations.doc_update_rule: When CLI/web/API/workflow behavior changes, update the nearest user-facing docs before treating the work as ready.
